title: arabis lyallii var. typica
intro: Arabis lyallii var. typica, also known as the Alpine Rockcress, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Arabis lyallii var. typica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to soothe digestive issues and promote overall well-being.
